brand_profile.writing_instruction: To match this brand voice, use the Geist font family and a muted color palette with primary color #1a0f13 and secondary color #65454e. The overall design category is minimal-saas, characterized by plenty of whitespace and a restrained tone. Use font weights 400, 500, and 600 to create a clear hierarchy of information, and maintain a consistent border radius of .625rem to create a sense of cohesion throughout the design.

product_knowledge.tagline: Visibility & Analytics from AI Search — and the actions to drive growth
product_knowledge.description: Searchable is an AI search optimization platform that helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines like ChatGPT and Claude, driving growth through actionable insights. It provides comprehensive tracking, optimization tools, and actionable insights to improve AI search rankings. The platform offers features such as AI visibility tracking, content optimization, technical audits, and competitive analysis to help brands capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines. With Searchable, brands can monitor their brand mentions and rankings, optimize their content for AI search, and identify areas for improvement to increase their online visibility and drive growth.

features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor your brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve your AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track your share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

features.name: Real-time Alerts
features.description: Get notified when your brand is mentioned or rankings change

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Detailed insights into traffic, citations, and performance metrics

benefits: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Improve visibility when prospects research solutions via AI
Ensure your content is cited and linked by AI engines
Get recommended by AI for local searches
Deliver AI search optimization services to clients

proof_points.text: Generated over £1 million in qualified pipeline from AI search

pain_points: Difficulty tracking brand mentions and rankings across AI engines
Struggling to optimize content for AI search
Limited visibility into AI search performance metrics
Difficulty identifying areas for improvement to increase online visibility
Struggling to stay ahead of competitors in AI search rankings
messaging_angles: Optimize for the future of search
Improve your online visibility and drive growth
product_knowledge.target_customer: E-commerce brands, B2B software companies, content publishers, local businesses, and agencies

platform_rules_summary: Hook must be standalone in first 180 characters
3-5 hashtags at end only, never inline
Short paragraphs with blank line between each
content_brief.benchmark_reference: Industry benchmarks for data analytics products on LinkedIn
content_brief.reasoning: With 5 pain points and 6 distinct features, a carousel is the best content type to showcase the product's capabilities and address the target audience's concerns. The minimal brand tone also supports a more educational and step-by-step approach. Although the brand tone is minimal, which could also suggest a text post, the high feature count and pain point count make carousel a more suitable choice. The presence of 2 proof points and a strong stat further support the use of a carousel, as it can effectively display these proof points and stats in a visually engaging way. The lack of a customer name does not negatively impact this choice, as the focus is on educating the audience about the product's features and benefits.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Difficulty tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines daily
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Searchable drives growth through AI search optimization
strategy_brief.differentiator: unlike traditional SEO platforms that focus on traditional search engines
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Start by identifying the pain points of tracking brand mentions across AI engines

linkedin_content.hook: Start by identifying the pain points of tracking brand mentions across AI engines
linkedin_content.body:
Tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines can be a daunting task. It's a daily struggle to stay on top of the conversations happening about your brand. You spend hours scouring through search results, only to feel like you're missing something.

The cost of not having a clear view of your brand's online presence is staggering. You're likely losing valuable insights that could inform your marketing strategy and drive growth. The time spent manually tracking brand mentions could be better spent on high-leverage activities.

The reality is, manual tracking is not only time-consuming but also prone to errors. You might miss important mentions or struggle to identify trends and patterns. This can lead to poor decision-making and a lack of progress towards your goals.

The financial implications of not optimizing your brand's online presence can be severe. You're potentially leaving money on the table by not being able to effectively track and respond to customer conversations. The opportunity cost of not having a clear view of your brand's online presence is significant.

A solution to this problem is needed, one that can help you streamline your tracking and optimization efforts. This is where AI search optimization comes in, a game-changer for businesses looking to drive growth.

Searchable is a powerful tool that drives growth through AI search optimization. With Searchable, you can easily track brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines, giving you a clear view of your online presence.

The results are impressive, with companies seeing a 206% share of voice improvements. This is a significant increase in visibility and reach, allowing businesses to drive more growth and revenue.

Start your free trial today and discover how Searchable can help you drive growth through AI search optimization.

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy clearly explains the pain points of tracking brand mentions and the benefits of using AI search optimization, but some sentences are slightly long and convoluted, requiring a minor re-read to fully understand. The hook effectively identifies a daily struggle and creates a sense of urgency, but it's not particularly surprising or attention-grabbing, and the payoff is slightly delayed. The tone is generally restrained and professional, but the use of the phrase 'game-changer' is slightly inconsistent with the minimal-saas design category and the muted tone, and the language could be more concise and direct in some places. The copy accurately reflects the primary claim and uses the proof point verbatim, with no fabricated statistics or claims.
